subcodes.first_line: O Sakinih! The Wronged One of the World maketh mention of thee from within the Most Great Prison, and counselleth thee concerning that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سکینه مظلوم عالم در سجن اعظم ترا ذکر مینماید وصیت میفرماید بر آنچه سبب
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
